posts.author: AlessandraB (Alessandra )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I know that I can change the item height and the text will wrap. Unfortunately, as soon as the text contains too much, it is simply labelled “…” instead of the text “wrapping” up completely. We want to add text columns to the portfolio feature, for example, to provide a short monthly update. But as soon as there is too much text in the cell, it disappears. Although the item height has already been set to the highest value in the portfolio feature. I think it would be great if the text column “Long text” had the function that there is a “wrap text”. Otherwise it is unfortunately very bad for readability.
Thank you very much!!
